name: Fishing Alive
author: Poki
description: Fishing Alive is a fishing game that lets you dive deep into the ocean and put your fishing skills to the test! Cast your hook, wave your rod, and see how far down you can go. The deeper you venture, the more valuable and exotic the fish you’ll catch! Sell your haul to earn money, which you can use to upgrade your rod and boat. With the right strategy, can you catch all the fish at once? How to play Fishing Alive? Click or tap the screen to start fishing. Move your mouse or finger left and right to move the hook. Who created Fishing Alive? Fishing Alive is created by AdaBella Games. Play their other games on Poki: Fish Drop ! How can I play Fishing Alive for free? You can play Fishing Alive for free on Poki. Can I play Fishing Alive on mobile devices and desktop? Fishing Alive can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
